## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint && make test` pass
- [ ] Added/updated a test for the change
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (or a strong reason in the description)
- [ ] No claim added that outruns shipped, tested behavior (README/comparison/CHANGELOG)
- [ ] If it's an adapter change: the adapter stays a thin wrapper over the four verbs
